name: BTD6 Heroes
description:
Monkey Heroes from the game BTD6 made by Ninja Kiwi.

Plot: The Monkey Heroes gathered at their hidden jungle camp next to they kingdom, weary but victorious after repelling the Bloons’ fifth invasion. Some traded stories by the fire, others tended to gear, while a few lingered at the edges ever vigilant. The air buzzed with exhaustion and quiet pride.

Characters: Quincy, Gwendolin, Striker Jones, Obyn Greenfoot, Geraldo, Captain Churchill, Benjamin, Ezili, Pat Fusty, Adora, Admiral Brickell, Etienne, Sauda, Psi, Corvus Rosalia and all Bloons.

Art by Christy

Orginal idea by @Moldy_Dust
creator: DavidTheStar
